MARCSubfieldLabel: Edition statement (NR), Remainder of edition statement (NR)
Transformation Notes:
combine values, maintaining isbd punctuation. " = " indicates preceding and following string is a new value for subproperty "has designation of edition" <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30133>. " / " indicates following string is a new value for subproperty "statement of responsibility relating to edition" <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30121> 

If a reproduction condition is present, apply mapping and transformation to OriginalM, not ReproM. - LA, DC 2024-09-11

mapped element + value + "applies to: " + [value of $3] - CP 2025-01-29

If a reproduction condition is present, apply mapping and transformation to OriginalM, not ReproM. - LA, DC 2024-09-11

Justification for Mapping: not yet implemented; Very few results and requires significant system resource.
